content:
Tip: Please be constructive and specific. Use examples from the text where possible.

⸻

Reflection Prompts

After revising your draft (Thursday), write a brief reflection (150–250 words) addressing:
• What specific changes did you make based on peer feedback?
• How did the revision process enhance the clarity and effectiveness of your essay?
• What challenges did you encounter, and how did you address them?
• What areas do you plan to focus on for future revisions?

⸻

Additional Multimedia & Resources

To further enhance your learning:
• Supplemental Videos: Watch short videos on “Effective Peer Review” and “Final Editing Strategies” (links provided in Lecture Content).
• Downloadable Checklists: Access printable versions of the Peer Feedback Template and Reflection Prompts from the “Resources” folder.
• Live Workshops: Join optional live revision workshops (scheduled bi-weekly) where instructors walk through sample essays.
